userDefinedField.fieldValue: MW id 17 Start date can not be prior to insertion date unless full coupon is activated
MW id 6.1 Not possible in VCON to book Float Float XXCY
MW id 7.1 Not possible in VCON to have fixing calendar different than payment calendar
MW id 7.2 Not possible in VCON to have fixing calendar different than payment calendar
MW id 9 CSTM _DEAL OR mutual break status or clearing decision as Yes
Receive EUR EURIBOR 3M on floating leg 1,000,000 Pay USD LIBOR 3M on floating leg 1,093,600 Expiry 03 dec 2015
Cross Currency Resettable Interest Rate Swap
EMIR Eligible.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
